{{documentation}}
An infobox describing a Skill.

==Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox Skill
|name = Name of the skill
|image = Icon of the skill
|imagesize = The size of the image (if not default)
|description = Short description of the skill
}}</pre>

==Example==
<pre>
{{Infobox Skill
|name = Mining
|image = Mining.png
|description = Mine ore, clay or stone, or gather stones from the floor to level this skill.
}}</pre>

{{Infobox Skill
|name = Mining
|image = Mining.png
|description = Mine ore, clay or stone, or gather stones from the floor to level this skill.
}}
{{clear}}
{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
            "description": "Name of the skill",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
            "description": "Icon of the skill",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
			"label": "Image size",
            "description": "The size of the image (if not default)",
			"type": "number",
			"default": "80"
		},
		"description": {
			"label": "Description",
            "description": "Short description of the skill",
			"type": "string"
		}
	},
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"imagesize",
		"description"
	]
}
</templatedata>
}}
